description: Unique row identifier.
Reaction class such as SPAAC CuAAC or thermal_Huisgen.
Azide partner name or generic descriptor.
Alkyne partner name.
Catalyst description; use none if uncatalyzed.
1 if catalyst is present otherwise 0.
Solvent or buffer as reported.
Coarse solvent class such as aqueous organic mixed unknown.
Temperature in kelvin.
pH if reported.
Second-order rate constant or reported kinetic value.
Unit for k_value; keep as reported and normalize where possible.
Activation energy in kJ/mol.
Reported yield in percent.
SMILES for main alkyne or representative substrate.
Manual family label such as cyclooctyne fluorinated_cyclooctyne dibenzocyclooctyne.
Manual ordinal descriptor from 0 to 3.
Number of fluorine substituents on the reactive alkyne scaffold.
Number of fused aromatic rings in the alkyne scaffold.
1 if key cycloalkyne ring includes a heteroatom otherwise 0.
Human label such as slow medium fast.
Paper review database or source note.
DOI when available.
primary_article review public_db secondary_summary or template.
primary_checked needs_primary_check or template.
Free-text caveats and extraction notes.
